MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona Jairus Gaudario for failure to Obtain answer(s) or enter default against defendant(s) is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. For Application To Vacate Judgment Set Aside & Re-Open Superior Court Case #413930 Of 01/04/2001 In Pursuant To Ccp Section 662
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jairus Gaudario, propria persona plaintiff.
